creator: sf@FreeBSD.org
text:
This port builds fine for me. It seems you have cvsup problem.
Make sure you have correct patches.

/usr/ports/graphics/avifile$ ls -l files
total 4
-rw-r--r--  1 cvs  cvs  448 Oct 10 00:52 patch-aa
-rw-r--r--  1 cvs  cvs  507 Jan  7 08:49 patch-ab
-rw-r--r--  1 cvs  cvs  402 Oct 10 00:52 patch-ac
-rw-r--r--  1 cvs  cvs  549 Jan  7 08:49 patch-ae
